attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 51 AUC answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AUC casebundles in this batch (n=51)

transform_flags: Patient age not stated in source ('elderly'); inferred as 82 (older_adult) as a conservative placeholder — clinician to confirm the true age on review.
Sex inferred as male from pronouns ('he', 'his own name') in the source note.
case_id SEQ is provisional (SPEC-ENDO-04-00035 derived from source AUC-035) — maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-ENDO-04 bucket.
Specialty tagged ENDO (primary) with GERI secondary; reviewer may reprioritise.
Difficulty tier set atypical_presentation_high_risk (DD=04): high-mortality emergency whose insidious onset and non-ketotic features must steer the reasoner away from DKA/stroke/urosepsis anchors.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present after-hours clinician at a nursing home who verified capillary glucose, positioned the patient and activated a Priority 1 ambulance; reprojected to recognise-and-escalate (000) plus carer-deliverable measures only. Presentation layer de-anchored from the clinician's known diagnosis.

Nursing-facility-obtained vitals (BP 90/55, HR 112, Temp 37.8, SpO2 95%, weight 68 kg) and the 'HI' glucometer reading routed to 01.objective_data_offered as caregiver_reported/verified:false (facility staff are carers who can obtain them); clinician-only discriminators (absence of Kussmaul breathing/acetone breath) and expected hospital biochemistry sealed in 10/11.
No medication doses are stated in the source for IV fluids, insulin or antibiotics; none were synthesised — dose_route_frequency omitted per the no-invented-dose rule. Not a paediatric case.

Drug AMT/PBS candidate codes omitted where not confidently known (IV saline, insulin, empirical antibiotic) to avoid fabricated codes; diagnosis/comorbidity/differential SNOMED + ICD-10-AM candidates registered as unverified.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
